BaseTemplate.description:
Connecting Our Roots,
Reviving Our Traditions.

Index.meta_title: Garah Anand | Sikh history and stories
Index.meta_description: Garah Anand shares Sikh history and narratives in a calm, readable space — for study, reflection, and preservation.
Index.satgur_prasad_image_alt: Ik Onkar and Satgur Prasad in Gurmukhi calligraphy
Index.index_paragraph_1: Garah Anand is a home for Sikh history: events, people, and ideas presented with clarity and respect. We focus on reading comfort, careful sourcing, and a tone that honours the tradition.
Index.index_paragraph_2: Whether you are new to these stories or returning to them, we hope this site helps you learn at your own pace — in English, Hindi, or Punjabi — without distraction.
Index.index_point_1: Long-form articles and curated material for deeper reading
Index.index_point_2: A calm, archival visual style that keeps attention on the text
Index.index_point_3: English, Hindi, and Punjabi so more readers can take part

About.meta_description: Garah Anand revives the age-old traditions of our Gurus for a principle-driven life.
About.about_paragraph: Garah Anand is a space dedicated to reviving the age-old traditions of our Gurus for a principle-driven life.

BlogPage.meta_description: Articles and reflections from Garah Anand.
BlogPage.heading: Blog
BlogPage.intro: Long-form writing on Sikh history, tradition, and community — published here as it is ready.
BlogPage.empty_message: No posts yet. New pieces will appear here once they are published.

BlogSlugPage.not_found_description: This blog post could not be found.

Portfolio.meta_description: Browse selected stories and articles from Garah Anand.
Portfolio.presentation: Here you can explore a growing collection of pieces from Garah Anand — each one chosen to support learning and reflection.

PortfolioSlug.meta_description: Read this piece on Garah Anand.
PortfolioSlug.content: This article is part of Garah Anand’s collection. We present context, narrative, and detail so readers can follow the thread of history with confidence. More pieces will appear here as the library grows.

Donate.title: Support our seva
Donate.quote: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਸਫਲ ਹੈ ਜੇ ਕੋ ਕਰੇ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇ॥
Donate.description: Your Dasvandh helps us provide free paper, qalam, and traditionally made inks to over 450 Likharis.
Donate.qr_alt: PhonePe QR code for donations to Garh Anand Welfare Society
